name: Generations Bancorp NY, Inc.
business: Generations Bancorp NY, Inc. operates as a community bank, primarily taking deposits and originating/purchasing loans, including one- to four-family residential real estate loans, consumer loans (automobile, recreational vehicle, manufactured home), and commercial loans.
sellsTo: Consumers in the northern Finger Lakes region of New York State
Small businesses in the northern Finger Lakes region of New York State

exposures.sentence: Our business consists primarily of taking deposits from the general public and, through our commercial bank subsidiary, Generations Commercial Bank, from New York State and County municipalities and agencies, and investing those deposits, together with borrowings and funds generated from operations, in the origination and purchase of one- to four-family residential real estate loans, including home equity loans and lines of credit.
